creator: jbo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Got a message directing me to this PR.

Using AX201 and stable/14 commit 7c5d816006cd0370149028f0a1fbedeaf634848a.


iwlwifi0@pci0:0:20:3:	class=0x028000 rev=0x20 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x8086 device=0xa0f0 subvendor=0x8086 subdevice=0x0070


iwlwifi0: successfully loaded firmware image 'iwlwifi-QuZ-a0-hr-b0-77.ucode'
...
iwlwifi0: loaded firmware version 77.2df8986f.0 QuZ-a0-hr-b0-77.ucode op_mode iwlmvm


iwlwifi0: Not associated and the session protection is over already...
iwlwifi0: linuxkpi_ieee80211_connection_loss: vif 0xfffffe013f9feec0 vap 0xfffffe013f9fe010 state AUTH
Security policy loaded: MAC/ntpd (mac_ntpd)
drmn0: [drm] Selective fetch area calculation failed in pipe A
wlan0: link state changed to UP
wlan0: link state changed to DOWN
Invalid TXQ id
iwl_mvm_tx_mpdu:1280: fc 0x00b0 tid 8 txq_id 65535 mvm 0xfffffe016245b508 skb 0xfffffe0164f20000 { len 30 } info 0xfffffe00e1276cd0 sta 0xfffff8012528f8c0 (if you see this please report to PR 274382)
wlan0: link state changed to UP
Limiting closed port RST response from 541 to 197 packets/sec
